entry.title: lissy93 closed an issue in web-check
entry.content:
lissy93 closed an issue in lissy93/web-check · May 21, 2026 14:04
[Bug] "DNS Records" card truncates IPv6 addresses (visibility only) #300
Regarding the "DNS Records" card, it cuts off the end of any full IPv6 addresses *visually*. The actual `<span> contains the full address, but the card i…</span>
